name: productivity-toolkit
description: A productivity toolkit for Claude Code. Bundles two plugins — python-code-style (Python style enforcement & review) and text-to-diagrams (turn text into diagram pages). Install plugins individually via /plugin install.

plugins.name: python-code-style
plugins.description: Enforce professional Python style guidelines for code generation and review. Includes naming conventions, docstring formats (Args/Returns/Raises), import rules, formatting standards, code review checklist, and industry best practices.

plugins.name: text-to-diagrams
plugins.description: Turn raw text into one HTML page of diagrams (architecture, flowchart, sequence, ER, pyramid, donut, line/bar chart, swimlane, tree, layer-stack, venn, candlestick, waterfall, quadrant, state-machine, timeline) plus standalone SVGs. 17 diagram types, kami-style.
